item.title: Nebula v1.4.20
item.sparkle:description:
Nebula v1.4.20 introduces new features, bug fixes, and improvements.
- Fixed app crashing when account has no subscriptions
- Added view for all subscriptions and their start and expiry
- Improved UI transition smoothness between Grid and List View
- Fixed bug for "Recently Played" games not showing / not responsive
- Fixed bug for "Manage Subscriptions & Billing" button not responsive
